Notice Of Hearing For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-09-2023 Continued To Aug-09-23 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 505

Notice Of Hearing For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-09-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Lydia Villarreal; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 2:17 p.m. and concluding at 3:03 p.m.

Plaintiff Josephine Cillufo appearing represented by Baron Drexel, Esq is placed under oath and testifies.
Defendant Armando Bonifacio not appearing.

Plaintiff is placed under direct examination.

Plaintiff requests $150,000.00 in damages for pain and suffering, The Court reduces the amount of damages for pain and suffering to $50,000.00

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Josephine Cillufo, and against Defendant Armando Bonifacio, as follows:

1. Damages: $50,000.00
2. Special Damages: $9,432.00
3. Costs: $659.87

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $60,091.87

Counsel for Plaintiff to prepare and submit proposed Judgment for Courts review and signature. (D505)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

Off Calendar Jun-07-2023 Continued To Aug-09-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:41:01 a.m. pausing at 9:47:36 a.m. resuming at 9:53:19 a.m. and concluding at 10:07:42 a.m.

Plaintiff Josephine Cillufo appearing represented by Baron Drexel Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Armando Bonifacio not appearing.

The Court finds that a statment of damages was not filed prior to the entery of default.

The Court ORDERS the matter continued to August 9, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., to give Plaintiff time to file a Statment of Damages and serve the same on the Defendant. (D505)
